title: Property Consultant - Man Infraconstruction - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Man Infraconstruction - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Man Infraconstruction, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
